productDisplayName: Carlton London Men Formal Brown Formal Shoes
description: Perfect for those semi-formal occasions, this pair of leather shoes from carlton london is designed for the man who loves to experiment.UpperLeather upper with perforations for enhanced durability and styleReinforced fabric detailing around the central lacing for added durabilityReinforced heel panel for enhanced durabilityLaces-ups for snug FitStitch detailing for styleMidsoleTPU midsole for durability and comfortMildly cushioned footbed for protectionOutsoleTPU outsole for enhanced durability and comfortDecoupled raised heel with back panel made of durable rubber for grip and supportshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shineStore away from sunlight
